labels: bug

---

## Skill

**Skill name:** (e.g. `ros2-create-pkg`, `ros2-debug-node`)
**Invocation:** <!-- exact slash command and arguments used -->

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or incorrect output.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04)
- **ROS2 distro:** (e.g. Humble)
- **Claude Code version:** (`claude --version`)

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Additional context

Screenshots, logs, or anything else that might help.

## Checklist

- [ ] Searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] ROS2 environment was sourced (`echo $ROS_DISTRO` shows the distro)
- [ ] Included the exact slash command used
